info.name: Lons - GraphQL API
info.description: GraphQL API collection for the Lons B2B2C lending platform. All operations use POST to the GraphQL endpoint with application/json content type.

exec: // Set Authorization header from authToken variable
console.log('Auth token saved to authToken variable');

request.description: Login with tenant slug, email, and password. Saves the returned access token to the authToken variable automatically.
Login with tenant ID, email, and password.
Login as a platform-level admin user.
Exchange a refresh token for a new access token and refresh token pair.
List tenants with cursor-based pagination.
Fetch a single tenant by ID.

graphql.query:
query Products($pagination: PaginationInput, $type: String, $status: String) {
  products(pagination: $pagination, type: $type, status: $status) {
    edges {
      node {
        id
        code
        name
        description
        type
        status
        currency
        minAmount
        maxAmount
        minTenorDays
        maxTenorDays
        interestRateModel
        interestRate
        repaymentMethod
        gracePeriodDays
        approvalWorkflow
        maxActiveLoans
        createdAt
        updatedAt
      }
      cursor
    }
    pageInfo {
      hasNextPage
      hasPreviousPage
      startCursor
      endCursor
    }
    totalCount
  }
}

request.description: List products for the authenticated tenant with optional type/status filters.

graphql.query:
query Product($id: ID!) {
  product(id: $id) {
    id
    code
    name
    description
    type
    status
    currency
    minAmount
    maxAmount
    minTenorDays
    maxTenorDays
    interestRateModel
    interestRate
    repaymentMethod
    gracePeriodDays
    approvalWorkflow
    maxActiveLoans
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

request.description: Fetch a single product by ID.

graphql.query:
mutation CreateProduct($input: CreateProductInput!, $idempotencyKey: String) {
  createProduct(input: $input, idempotencyKey: $idempotencyKey) {
    id
    code
    name
    description
    type
    status
    currency
    minAmount
    maxAmount
    interestRateModel
    interestRate
    repaymentMethod
    gracePeriodDays
    approvalWorkflow
    maxActiveLoans
    createdAt
  }
}
graphql.variables:
{
  "input": {
    "code": "ML-001",
    "name": "Quick Micro Loan",
    "description": "Short-term micro loan for mobile wallet users",
    "type": "micro_loan",
    "currency": "GHS",
    "minAmount": "100.0000",
    "maxAmount": "5000.0000",
    "minTenorDays": 7,
    "maxTenorDays": 90,
    "interestRateModel": "flat",
    "interestRate": "5.0000",
    "repaymentMethod": "equal_installments",
    "gracePeriodDays": 3,
    "approvalWorkflow": "auto",
    "maxActiveLoans": 1
  },
  "idempotencyKey": "{{idempotencyKey}}"
}

request.description: Create a new loan product. Generates an idempotency key automatically via pre-request script.

graphql.query:
mutation UpdateProduct($id: ID!, $input: UpdateProductInput!) {
  updateProduct(id: $id, input: $input) {
    id
    code
    name
    description
    type
    status
    minAmount
    maxAmount
    interestRate
    updatedAt
  }
}

request.description: Update an existing product by ID.
Activate a product, making it available for loan requests.
Suspend a product, preventing new loan requests.
List customers for the authenticated tenant with optional status/kycLevel filters.

graphql.query:
query Customer($id: ID!) {
  customer(id: $id) {
    id
    firstName
    lastName
    phone
    email
    status
    kycLevel
    dateOfBirth
    nationalId
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

request.description: Fetch a single customer by ID. Sensitive fields (nationalId, phone) require field-level authorization.
Add a customer to the blacklist.
Remove a customer from the blacklist.
List lenders for the authenticated tenant.
Fetch a single lender by ID.
List loan requests with optional status and customer filters.

graphql.query:
query LoanRequest($id: ID!) {
  loanRequest(id: $id) {
    id
    customerId
    productId
    requestedAmount
    requestedTenor
    currency
    status
    channel
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

request.description: Fetch a single loan request by ID.
Create a new loan request. Generates an idempotency key automatically.
Run the full auto pipeline: validate, pre-qualify, score, approve, and generate offer.
Accept a loan offer, creating a contract, generating a repayment schedule, and initiating disbursement.
Decline a loan offer.
List contracts with optional customer and status filters.

graphql.query:
query Contract($id: ID!) {
  contract(id: $id) {
    id
    loanRequestId
    customerId
    productId
    principalAmount
    disbursedAmount
    totalOutstanding
    currency
    status
    disbursedAt
    maturityDate
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

request.description: Fetch a single contract by ID.

graphql.query:
query RepaymentSchedule($contractId: ID!) {
  repaymentSchedule(contractId: $contractId) {
    id
    installmentNumber
    dueDate
    principalAmount
    interestAmount
    feeAmount
    totalAmount
    status
    paidAmount
    paidAt
  }
}

request.description: Get the repayment schedule for a contract.
List repayments for a specific contract.
Process a repayment against a contract. Amount is passed as a decimal string.
Get an early settlement quote for a contract.
List settlement runs with pagination.

graphql.query:
query SettlementRun($id: ID!) {
  settlementRun(id: $id) {
    id
    periodStart
    periodEnd
    status
    totalRevenue
    approvedBy
    approvedAt
    lines {
      id
      partyType
      partyId
      grossRevenue
      sharePercentage
      shareAmount
      netAmount
    }
    createdAt
  }
}

request.description: Fetch a single settlement run by ID.

graphql.query:
query SettlementReport($runId: ID!) {
  settlementReport(runId: $runId) {
    id
    periodStart
    periodEnd
    status
    approvedBy
    approvedAt
    totalRevenue
    revenueBreakdown {
      interest
      fees
      penalties
    }
    lines {
      id
      partyType
      partyId
      grossRevenue
      sharePercentage
      shareAmount
      netAmount
    }
    supportingRepaymentIds
    createdAt
  }
}

request.description: Get a detailed settlement report with revenue breakdown.
Calculate settlement for a given period.
Approve a settlement run.
Execute an approved settlement run.
Reject a settlement run with a reason.
List wallet provider configurations for the authenticated tenant.

graphql.query:
query WalletProviderConfig($id: ID!) {
  walletProviderConfig(id: $id) {
    id
    providerName
    authType
    baseUrl
    configJson
    requestMapping
    responseMapping
    webhookConfig
    resilience
    isActive
    createdAt
    updatedAt
  }
}

request.description: Fetch a single wallet provider config by ID with full details.
Create a new wallet provider configuration.
Update an existing wallet provider configuration.
Get health status for a specific integration provider.
Get health status for all integration providers.
View API logs for a specific integration provider within a date range.
